entry.title: Re: In S/4HANA 2023, can we write script using screen per...
entry.content: SAP Screen Personas can only modify classic, dynpro-based applications (transactions). Fiori apps are not supported.

entry.title: Re: allocation number equal to refference number
entry.content: What number do you currently have in reference field and what is the source of this number?

entry.title: Re: Connection - The default connection string cannot be used in sap business one, version for SAP H
entry.content:
Thank you, Mahendrakumar!

You might want to correct the SAP Note Number. The correct number is 2755830, the note number 2755380 is incorrect.

Direct Link: 2755830 - The Use of the UI API Connection String Is Not Recommended - SAP for Me

Best regards,

Joerg.

entry.title: How to get approve option in Tcode SBWP

I have to approve treasury delas in SBWP, but I am not getting option to approve, and I see 4 users are able to approve but I don't have the option to approve

Please provide configuration step or Tcode to add my USER ID as approver in SBWP

 

Please help us on this

Thanks in advance

Regards

Jithendra Shivashankar

entry.title: Re: Pay component required on Decimal to publish in EC
entry.content:
Hi @SF_Abhisek 

None. Hopefully you have the right value in one of the columns with all decimals and if so then you run an adhoc report and publish to EC by file import just for this year. 

All the best

Xavier

entry.title: Re: x-csrf-token extraction encrypted SHA256 error 403 CSRF token validation failed cloud integratio
entry.content: I tried all the steps but I still get the token in SHA256 encrypted form. I am trying to create a flow which first fetches the csrf token and then do a POST call to S4 Hana system for an API. But I keep getting 403 error with CSRF token validation failure.

entry.title: Unable to get a notification when a payment document is rejected
entry.content:
Hi,

As part of the supplier payment processing, we are trying to activate a workflow that sends a notification to the accounts payable accountant whenever a payment document is rejected. However, we have not been able to get it to work properly.

Here is the configuration we have implemented :

1.    Maintained employees using the "Maintain Workforce" tile.
2.    Created a team in "Manage Teams and Responsibilities" and assigned members with the function “Process Rejected Payments.”
3.    Copied and activated the default workflow for rejected payments via the “Manage Workflows – For Rejected Payments” tile.
4.    Maintained email templates by copying the standard template SWF_CRT_NOTIFY_RECIPIENTS, following the naming convention : YY1_78500057_CRT_ALL.
5.    Set up email notifications for workflow approvals and rejections by copying the standard email template SWF_WORKFLOW_COMPLETE_NOTIFY, with the following naming conventions:
             o    YY1_78500057_COMPLETE_POSITIVE – for approved workflows.
             o    YY1_78500057_COMPLETE_NEGATIVE – for rejected workflows.

We followed the guidance provided in the SAP blog How to Set Up the Email Notification for Flexible ... - SAP Community , which we believe aligns with our requirements.

With this setup, payment approvers do receive email notifications for payments pending their action. However, the accounts payable accountant does not receive any notification when a payment is rejected.

Can you please advise ? 

Thanks and regards,

entry.title: Re: Get records based on a another table that has a range (ABAP CDS)
entry.content:
Hi,

please check following code with the exists statement:

REPORT ztest.

TYPES: BEGIN OF ty_a,
         code TYPE char2,
       END OF ty_a,
       BEGIN OF ty_b,
         low  TYPE char2,
         high TYPE char2,
       END OF ty_B.
DATA: lt_a TYPE TABLE OF ty_a,
      lt_b TYPE TABLE OF ty_b.

lt_a = VALUE #( ( code = 'B1' ) ( code = 'B2' ) ( code = 'B3' ) ( code = 'B4' ) ( code = 'B5' ) ( code = 'B6' ) ( code = 'C1' ) ( code = 'c1' ) ).
lt_b = VALUE #( ( low = 'B2' high = 'B4' ) ( low = 'C1' ) ).

modify ZTEST_B from table lt_b.

SELECT a~code
FROM @LT_a AS a
WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM ZTEST_B AS b WHERE ( b~low <= a~code AND  b~high >= a~code ) OR b~high IS INITIAL AND b~low = a~code )
INTO TABLE @DATA(lt_result).

entry.title: AP Datasphere - is it possible to use hierarchies with directory in Business Builder?
entry.content:
Hello,

Could anyone please let me know if it is possible to use Hierarchies with Directory in the Datasphere Business Builder? I did use them with Analytical models before and they work seamlessly!

However, I did read a few blogs from the year 2023 which state the only parent-child hierarchies are possible with the Business Builder and that is with limitations with the drill down on SAC, is it still the case?

Kind regards,

Ashwin

entry.title: Re: Document Number Range Issue for Prior Year Posting –...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your questions on the SAP Community blog.

This issue typically arises in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition due to the way number ranges are assigned to document types and fiscal years. Let’s walk through the root cause and how you can correct it.

 

Root Cause Analysis

In S/4HANA Cloud, number ranges are maintained per fiscal year and per document type, and assigned via configuration settings.

If the system is picking the number range for 2024-25 (starting from 14) when you're posting to 2023-24, it likely means that the number range assignment for FY 2023-24 is either missing or has been overwritten.

This typically happens if:

  • You recently opened the 2023-24 period again after year-end closing.
  • You created or adjusted the number range for the new FY but didn't preserve the previous year's assignment.
  • The number range interval for 87 was not extended or correctly defined for FY 2023-24.

 

Steps to Correct the Issue

You will need to:

  • Check the number range interval for the document type.
  • Ensure separate intervals exist for both FY 2023-24 and FY 2024-25.
  • Verify the assignment between number range and fiscal year.

1. Go to the App: “Manage Journal Entry Number Ranges”

  • App ID: FBN1 equivalent in Public Cloud is via SSCUI 101702 - Define Document Number Ranges
  • Or access via “Manage Your Solution” > Configure Your Solution

2. Select Your Document Type (e.G., SA, ZJ, etc...)

3. Ensure the following:

  • For Fiscal Year 2023, number range interval 87 exists and is assigned to your document type.
  • For Fiscal Year 2024, number range interval 14 is assigned.

4. If not, create or reassign the interval correctly:

  • Add interval 87 for FY 2023 with the correct number range (e.g., From 87000000 to 87999999)
  • Add interval 14 for FY 2024 (e.g., From 14000000 to 14999999)

5. Save and test again by posting a document dated in FY 2023-24.

 

Important Notes:

  • In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, direct access to FBN1 is restricted. You must use SSCUI (Self-Service Configuration UI) or raise a ticket via SAP Support if it's not available.
  • Always check authorization for using the configuration app if it's not visible in your tenant.

 

Recommendation

To avoid such issues during year-end activities:

  • Maintain number ranges for at least two fiscal years in advance.
  • Document the assignment logic for each document type and year for auditability and consistency.

 

I hope this explanation will help you solve your issue.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Re: truncate last 3 chatechter from a string

entry.title: Re: No Validation for National ID
entry.content: We have a similar concern/issue with the national id field not being validated to ensure its in the correct format. Please vote for customer influence idea: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#idea/345493?section=sectionComments

entry.title: Issue with OData Requests in Analytical Models Following the Latest SAP Datasphere Update
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

Recently, we discovered an issue in SAP Datasphere: analytical models that use views with associations as their data source no longer process OData requests as they used to. This problem seems to have emerged after the latest SAP Datasphere update.

Until a few weeks ago, OData requests on analytical models based on views with associations were working correctly. However, now these requests are failing. We attempted to resolve the issue by recreating both the view and the analytical model, but without success.

Has anyone else experienced this problem following the latest SAP Datasphere update? If so, have you found any workaround or solution to restore the functionality of OData requests on analytical models using views with associations?

Any insights or experiences you can share would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Re: Question on Asset Acquisition Posting in 01/2025 with...
entry.content:
Hello dear user,

And thank you for asking your questions on the SAP Community blog.

Asset Accounting has strict rules about fiscal year handling, and your case sits exactly at the intersection of period closure, depreciation, and asset recognition rules.

 

Your Scenario in Brief:

Asset acquired: Identified in 01/2025.

Depreciation desired to start: 12/2024.

Posting period 12/2024: Already closed (posting is not possible).

FY 2024: Not closed (still open for audit).

You get an error when the asset value date ≠ posting date fiscal year.

 

Key Concepts in SAP FI-AA (S/4HANA Cloud)

1. Posting Date

Defines when the document hits the General Ledger.

Cannot be set in closed periods.

Technically, this determines the accounting period.

2. Asset Value Date

Triggers the start of depreciation.

Defines the capitalization date in FI-AA.

Must be in the same fiscal year as the posting date - this is standard SAP behavior to prevent mismatched accounting records.

3. Acquisition Year

Option you mentioned (current/previous year) is only relevant for manual revaluations or corrections, and mostly non-effective unless used in those contexts.

 

Why Your Attempt Fails

You want:

Posting date: 01/2025

Asset value date: 12/2024

SAP gives:

“Asset value date and posting date must be in same fiscal year”

This is standard logic and cannot be bypassed, especially in S/4HANA Cloud where direct table updates or custom logic isn't allowed.

 

Correct and Compliant Options

Option 1: Wait and Open Period 12/2024 Temporarily

Open period 12/2024, post with posting date in 12/2024 and asset value date = 12/2024.

Close period again.

This gives you the correct depreciation start.

 

Option 2: Post in 01/2025, Set Asset Value Date = 01/2025, and Adjust Depreciation Later

Post with posting date 01/2025, value date 01/2025 (SAP will allow this).

Then run depreciation recalculation (AFAR).

Manually post an unplanned depreciation for Dec 2024 equivalent if allowed by policy.

 

Option 3: Use a Prior Year Asset Transfer as a Workaround

Create a legacy asset with a value date = 12/2024

Use "Transfer within the same system" with effective date = 12/2024

No FI entry is generated if done carefully

Then post the actual acquisition in 01/2025

 

Best Practice (SAP-Recommended)

SAP recommends that the posting date and value date are always aligned, and if you missed a posting in a prior year/period, to either:

Temporarily open the prior period and post correctly, OR

Post in current period and adjust depreciation using manual posting or unplanned depreciation.

 

I hope this explanation will help you solve your issue.

Best regards,

Jeremy

entry.title: Email Verification Not Triggered After Lite Registration
entry.content:
Issue:
We created a sampling form using a CIAM screenset with Lite Registration. Our goal is to send a verification email right after form submission so that only valid emails get saved and only verified users have profiles created in Gigya.
 
We've enabled the Require Email Verification setting, but the email isn't being sent out (I didn't get any email) — yet the user profile is still being created in Gigya.
 
(1) Why is this happening? (2) What steps are we missing? (3) Can Lite Registration allow email verification? Pretty sure full registration allow it.
 

#SCREENSET #registration

entry.title: Re: SAP BTP Help Shorty - HTML5 Configuration issue "Failed to get Metadata - 400"
entry.content:
Hello Nils Janßen,

I wanted to let you know that updating the existing_destinations_policy to update successfully resolved the issue.

After making the change, I redeployed the MTA using the --force flag to ensure a complete redeployment of the application and all its components.

Thank you so much for sharing this solution—really appreciate your help!

In a maintenance order we have a person responsible for each operation, totaling 3 responsible, but this order is not enough for any of them in the Asset Manager mobile.

Many thanks for support,

Regards,
Nathalie Fernandes

entry.title: Re: Issue with OData Requests in Analytical Models Follow...
entry.content:
An example of the error:

{
"error": {
"code": "EXTEND_CSN_FAILED",
"message": "Compile failed with: CSN_COMPILATION_FAIL",
"innererror": {
"errors": [
{
"code": "CSN_COMPILATION_FAIL",
"substitutes": [
"Errors(FORMATTED): CSN property ‘@EndUserText.label’ is not expected in ‘mixin[]’ [Ln 13234] Errors(ORIGINAL): CSN property ‘@EndUserText.label’ is not expected in ‘mixin[]’ [Ln 13234]"
]
}
],
"name": "CompileError"
}
}
}

entry.title: ABAP CDS Input Parameter - Force Mandatory Value
entry.content:
Hi, I have an ABAP CDS Query with a two parameters.  

  1. The first parameter the user can dropdown to select the appropriate value.
  2. The second parameter I am defaulting a single value and want to restrict the parameter to this value.
    I would like to restrict the parameter so the user cannot use any value other than the defaulted value.
    They can attempt to change the value, but any other value should be an input error for that parameter.
    I could hide the defaulted parameter, but I want it to show on the selection screen for added context.
    I'd like to somehow make sure it's apparent to the user that this defaulted value is the only value allowed for the input parameter.  

Is there any way possible to restrict an ABAP CDS Input Parameter to single specific value as mentioned above?   

Thanks for any input on this.

entry.title: Re: How can we highlight New or Featured trainings more p...
entry.content: Currently, this is the option available. Alternatively, to have a different system behavior, it would be possible to have an enhancement request created for it (as per KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/2090228), where the Learning Product Management team can further review and assess the requested functionality to be considered in a future release.

entry.title: Re: RAP100 - There are no sections. The page is empty.
entry.content: You may send a feedback to SAP via https://support.learning.sap.com > Contact Us. See my experience on feedback: https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-learning-q-a/how-long-to-get-a-learning-journey-code-error-be-fixed-by-asking-https/qaq-p/14061158.

entry.title: Sap Mobile Services Client enforce browser for corporate security requirement
entry.content:
Hi,

 

We are developing the mobile application with SAP Mobile Services for security corporate reasons (INTUNE) we need to ensure that it is running on Microsoft Edge.

Is there a way to enforce this on the SAP standard app or a custom SAP Mobile Services Client.

 

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Sap Mobile Services Client enforce browser for corpor...
entry.content:
Hello,

Thank you for the shared details about the raised query.

Regarding your question about enforcing a specific browser, such as Edge, please notice that it's not possible: the MDK client only supports using WebView or the device's browser for authentication. We do not have any option to force the use of Edge for this kind of objective.  

Nevertheless, we can provide one alternative suggestion: try to create a branded client and there you can enable "AllowCerts" in the "ConnectionSettings" to have the client call the device's browser.

Hope this helps you with your objective.

Kind regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: LRN-191759 For this notification, is it triggered by...
entry.content:
Hi @Julie_Davis_Wyn 

As far as I understood, LRN-191759 refers to notifications triggered by the managers to be sent to their subordinates. For example, the notification the managers can triggered from the Team View page > Send Reminder.

To keep the manager's email address as the 'From email address' for such notifications, the setting 'Use Application Notification User Email for manager email notifications'.

Best regards,

entry.title: ABAP CDS - Virtual Cube Read Interface IF_RSRTS_CDS_READ behavior is doubled
entry.content:
Hi, I have a simple CDS Cube using the Cube Read Interface IF_RSRTS_CDS_READ.
This interface provides three methods:
IF_RSRTS_CDS_READ~DEFINE / ~READ / ~GET_PROPERTIES

In the ~GET_PROPERTIES Method I am setting the attribute "provide_exact_data" to true.
In the ~READ Method I am calling MYCLASS=>GET_DATA method to provide the result data in one pass.
In the ~READ Method after I get the result data I set the export parameter e_end_of_data = abap_true.
In the ~READ Method after I get the result data I write the result data to a DDIC table for history
With this it seems I am getting a double dataset written to the DDIC Table!

I debugged the Interface Methods and it unexpectedly looks like the ~READ Method is getting called a second time which would explain the double dataset results.  According to the non-existent documentation on this interface, having set the "e_end_of_data" should prevent this.  Even though I set the "e_end_of_data" variable on the first pass, the second pass shows the variable is empty.

Would anyone have input on why the ~READ Method might be getting executed a second time or how I can resolve this issue?

Thanks for any help with this.

entry.title: SuccessFactors Practice systems unavailable?
entry.content:

When navigating to my successfactors practice system (I had previously enrolled, and had been using it for the past 3 weeks), I'm presented with a message that says "System temporarily unavailable), on the main Practice System page for my learning journey.

Does that happen often? How long before the systems are back online? Any suggestions?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Learning metric
entry.content:

More details can also be found in the documentation below:

  • https://me.sap.com/notes/2784798
  • https://help.sap.com/docs/successfactors-platform/managing-user-license-compliance/running-sap-successfactors-learning-usage-metrics-report
  • https://me.sap.com/notes/2559814
  • https://me.sap.com/notes/2555939

Best regards,

entry.title: Clearing Error in F-44 and F-53 Tax code ** in procedure ZTAXIN is invalid
entry.content:
Hi

I am getting the below error while clearing Spl GL transactions in the vendor.

Tax code ** in procedure ZTAXIN is invalid.

Please support.

Example advance paid via indicator - A Rs. 100000

Invoice Received for Rs. 200000 in which we have hold amount via Spl GL indicator X Rs. 50000

Transaction is below

Vendor Cr. 150000

Vendor (X) Cr. 50000

Expenses Dr 100000 

Expense Dr 100000

Both Expenses have different tax code.

now while making the payment of RS. 90000  i am getting the error.

entry.title: Re: How to know user full name and details with sy-uname
entry.content:
Open Db table 'USR21'. Pass sy-uname in field 'BNAME'. Get 'PERSNUMBER' from it.

Pass 'PERSNUMBER' in table 'ADRP', you will get name in fields as 'NAME_FIRST', 'NAME_LAST', 'NAME_TEXT'.

entry.title: Re: How to know user full name and details with sy-uname
entry.content: Try V_USR_NAME

entry.title: Re: Fetch Sales Org and Currency in Subscription Order us...
entry.content: This wont help. As this is general statement but i need little more technical steps

entry.title: Re: Business rule for Location as Accrual Recalculation field
entry.content:
Can you give more information about what you are trying to do? Generally, if I use location, it is in the IF section, and the THEN section has different logic (ie. accrual rate) based on the location.

Alternatively, now that you have set the location, you could use a lookup table to define the accrual if that is what you are trying to do.

entry.title: Re: Portfolio Analyzer Configuration 101
entry.content:
Hi Gustavo,

 

Fantastic piece of work! However, I see that links inside your blog are no longer working. Can you please advise if there is any alternate way to reach them? Many thanks,

Bartek

entry.title: Re: What is the limit of number of flavours we can have f...
entry.content:
Technically speaking there is no limit, and it doesn't matter for performance how many flavors exist for a transaction.

However, you need to keep maintenance and assignment considerations for your flavors in mind. The more you have, the more effort will it require to manage them.

entry.title: estricting Invoice Quantity Field to Whole Numbers in SAP B&I
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm new to SAP and currently working with a generic implementation of SAP B&I integrated with our ERP system. I was wondering if there's a way to restrict the invoice quantity field to accept only whole numbers (i.e., integer values).

Any guidance or suggestions would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: Question: Is ABAP performance tracing (ST12) still a...
entry.content:
Hi Hermann,

great to hear! The biggest change here I can see - at least for the products we are building - is the move from big, stateful, SAP GUI/Dynpro Sessions to (hopefully) small stateless RAP calls, either from UI or APIs. Since backend complexity does not go away, performance gets even more important in those scenarios. Therefore, analysing performance in BTP ABAP Environments would be the most interesting topic for us. How to analyse a single API call, how to check days workload, etc.pp. Nice blogs about this from your side would be a dream!

All the best from Hamburg & happy writing, Holm

entry.title: Re: Time Series (Trend) chart
entry.content:
@achab, @SophieElgharib, @N1kh1l thank you all for your help. I was able to get this chart working as expected now with valid data. I have created dummy data that followed a pattern. I mean the data which didnt have lots of ups or downs. Also i got to know the application of time series chart is used for forecasting - stock prices, interest rates, monitoring patient data, inflation etc where data doesnt change a lot. 

So i conclude that the time series chart provides a valid forecasted value if the historical data follows a certain trend/pattern.

FYI, you can see the image shows Forecast Quality 5/5 when i used valid data

entry.title: Create 2 bits from a cit but to different business partners
entry.content:
Hello,

I have a requirement to generate 2 BITS from a CIT but to different business partners. I came up with options but stuck on all. One for company and another for its Headquarter.

The CIT and BIT contains custom fields based on which in CC calculation is happening.

So source sends Company CIT which gets saved in CI, and then is sent to CC for Rating and BIT is the output.

1. Master Dependent Charge - This will create both bits to same Business partner and CA always as output item of charge does not allow edit. So both BITs will have only company BP and CA only.

 

2. Dependent Items - This might not help as the calculation of 2 BITs are independent of each other. So even if i do Headquarter CIT as soon as Company BIT gets created, the Headquarter CIT should have all the custom fields with values = Company CIT which i am not sure happens. But let me know if it happens.

 

3. Partner Settlement - Here also similar situation like Dependent Items will come. 

 

So kindly let me know how to handle this requirement. Under 1 Headquarter BP there are 100+ companies BP. And we have 20+ such Headquarter BP.

entry.title: Re: H1_2025 | Display of Direct Reports / Team Size in Profile Preview
entry.content: In influence in 2024 an idea to keep direct reports count was added https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/332936/?section=sectionVotes

entry.title: SAP Fiori App F0106A SICF service missing
entry.content:
Hi All,

We have upgraded from S4 2018 to 2023, SAP Fiori App F0106A SICF service missing /sap/bc/ui5_ui5/sap/fin_receivables is missing .

Kindly help me to resolve the issue.

 

Best Regards,

Supreeth

entry.title: Delete a record during termination using business rule
entry.content:
Hello,

We currently have multiple bank records (in payment info portlet) for an employee (MAIN, Bonus)..During termination, we need to create a new record in the payment info with effective date as the termination date and only the Main bank gets created (Bonus bank info is deleted in the record).. Can we do such deletions through business rule?

entry.title: Re: Create a Profit & Loss Statement in SAP Analytics Cloud importing data from an Excel file
entry.content: Hi @Adnan44, it's already updated.

entry.title: Developing with SAP Integration Suite - don't see API Business Hub Enterprise. Trial "P" account
entry.content:
I have a trial P type account.  I'm on section 3 - 7 of the learning journey "developing with SAP Integration Suite".  I don't see API Business Hub Enterprise.  I added 3 roles today (AuthGroup.API.Admin, AuthGroup.API.ApplicationDeveloper, AuthGroup.APIPortalRegistration). 

Is it a timing issue and I will see later OR is it not available with a trail account?  It appears you should be able to get to by going to "SAP integration Suite" and clicking on the 9 dot applications icon on the upper right.  I see SAP Business Accelerator Hub, SAP BTP Cockpit, API Management Client SDK, Develop Hub, and Graph Navigator.  I dont' see "API Business Hub Enterpise".  I was trying to do the Engage, Create, ... to create a product.  When I go to publish, it doesn't work and doesn't give any reason.  I think it is because I can't get to API business hub enterprise.  Clues?

entry.title: Business Application Studio in BTP - Unable to connect to ABAP backend
entry.content:
Hi Experts.

Since yesterday (Tuesday) I have been unable to make a connection to an OnPremise ABAP (S/4HANA) system, when testing a UI5 app. The setup has been working for a long time, but now I cannot connect. When I start my UI5 app, the $metadata call made by the UI5 framework fails. I have also tried using a curl statement directly in the Terminal, and that does not work either.

I have tried testing for different customers, thereby using different subaccounts, SAP Cloud Connector and backend systems. I have also tested both in eu10 and eu20.

However when using the wizard to create a new application with the basic template delivered by SAP, I am able to make a call to the backend to extract the list of OData services. So the connection is technically working, I just cannot use it for testing my application in BAS.

Does anybody else have similar problems ?

Thanks and best regard,

Søren Hansen

12 May

entry.title: TLS configuration for SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
Hello team, 

Could you please provide information on how SAP Commerce manages the setup for SSL/TLS version 1.2 and later? 

Thank you!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: TLS configuration for SAP Commerce Cloud
entry.content:
SAP Commerce Cloud uses SSL/TLS certificates to establish secure, encrypted connections between users' browsers and the SAP Commerce Cloud endpoints. You can find more information on how they are configured in the article SSL/TLS Certificates.

Additionally, you can refer to the article Security - Trusted TLS/SSL Ciphers to know which ciphers are supported in SAP Commerce Cloud.

entry.title: Re: Sap Enable Now Launch Error - ZIP Error & FDIError
entry.content:
Hi,

The only other things I can think to check, while you wait for support to get back to you, is to ensure that you have implemented the minimum requirements, e.g. the Enable Now URL has been added to your Trusted Sites.  It sounds like a virus scanner attacking Producer but you mention that you deactivated your virus scanner so that may not be the issue.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Screen persona profiler or similar tool for Zebra RF...
entry.content:
vananko,

Thanks for the reply. I agree with you and used dev tools to see the performance of each click and push buttons. But when I do same on RF device it takes more time and I want to locate the particular element in in overall call which is causing this delay. So far haven't come across any tool which could be installed on RF device to give such analysis. 

Thanks

Ritz

entry.title: Re: SAP RE-FX Asset Retirement process after Lease contract has ended
entry.content: Hello, im not getting an error, but I have applied a notice to the contract, and the asset will not deactivate. I get nothing. Please assist.

entry.title: Re: SAP Walkme and SAP Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi Kristina,

Unfortunately, there is still very little actual detail, like a Roadmap, available to share.  Take a look at this post by Kristina Kunad and follow Kristina on the Community because it is likely that she will be the one to share the updates when they become available.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Ability to see Activities across multiple Planning Scenarios
entry.content: Is there a way to view activities and personnel from multiple planning scenarios on the planning and dispatching board? Currently, only one planning scenario can be selected at a time, but we want to be able to see emergency orders across multiple divisions simultaneously and dispatch orders accordingly.

entry.title: Re: Blog it Forward - Raquel Cunha - version 2025
entry.content:
Hi Sato!
@edusatobr  Great to see you engaging here my friend! How is life in Mexico? As I told you once, and @MariettaLopez and @Sandra_Solis already know, Mexico is in my heart, it was the first country I worked in when I started my journey abroad, and I miss a lot my friends from there, the food, the energy and joy. I hope you have a great time there! 
Thank you for your comment 🤗

Have you checked my first Blog it forward too? There I mention how all of this history started. 😉

entry.title: Spaces and Pages Export
entry.content:
Hi SAP,

 

I would like to know how to export or download the Spaces and Pages information in S/4HC. 

 

Kind regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Spaces and Pages Export
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

 

It is only possible to download Launchpad Pages. 

As per the documentation SAP Help Portal | Uploading and Downloading Pages, follow the steps below:

  1. Open the Manage Launchpad Pages app.
  2. In the Overview, select all pages you want to download.
  3. Click Download.

A .json file is created and downloaded. The file name includes "Pages", the system name and the date.

The file is only created with .json type and is not possible to change that.

 

It's not possible to download Spaces.

However, if you want to add Spaces and Pages to other tenant, for example you want to send your Spaces and Pages from Customizing Tenant to Test or Productive Systems, you can use the Transports feature.

You create your Spaces and Pages in the Source System and transport it to the target systems using Export Software Collection and Import Collection app.

Regarding the transport, check SAP Help Portal - How to Manage and Export Your Software Collection 

 

Kind regards,

SAP Support.

entry.title: Re: Blog it Forward - Raquel Cunha - version 2025
entry.content:
@MariettaLopez Thank you dear!

#togetherwearestronger

entry.title: Re: Enable Now Manager - Error message when deleting an O...
entry.content:
Hi Andrew,

The only thing I can think of is it's a standard Org Unit but outside that, there should be no issue deleting them.  Unfortunately, the error message doesn't help much.  Please raise a support ticket and let Support take a closer look; use the Component ID KM-SEN-MGR.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: MD04 Available qty not correct as per scope of check
entry.content:
Hi, 

In MD04, the "Available stock" is not equal to the ATP Scope of check, instead it's combining all the stock type quantities from MMBE and showing it as Available stock in MD04. Even when I run the back-order process, it is still not correct (all stock types showing available)

I have defined the scope of check to exclude Quality stock, exclude Vendor sub con stock and Exclude Blocked stock as well. But all those three stock types are showing at "Available stock " in MD04.

I know the to disable to block stock at plant level in OPPI, that's still enabled, we don't to enable that at plant level. Besides that the Quality stock and Sun con stock should not show as available stock.

Also based on what Availability checking rule does the MD04 shows the stock? All of my checking rule are without special stock. 

OPJJ= Scope of check PP maintained to exclude quality and blocked stock.

entry.title: Re: What is the limit of number of flavours we can have f...
entry.content: Thank you Tamas, that helps

entry.title: Re: Blog It Forward - Lluis Salvador
entry.content:
I loved your blog @Lluis! I was sure you would have a lot of fantastic things to share. And I learned a lot more about you!

You also added an epic picture of a SolMan meeting we had in Barcelona! Loved it! Great moments we’ll never forget.

entry.title: How to automate a warehouse task creation
entry.content:
Hi there,

I have a process which consists to transfer material across different storage types. I need to automate the creation of the next task after the previous one is confirmed. Example :

First task : storage type SRAC to NAVS

second one : storage type NAVS to NAVE

third one : NAVE to CRAC

I will create the first manually and I want that when I confirm it, the second one is automatically created and when the second is confirmed, the third one is created too.

How would you configure the system?

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: How can we highlight New or Featured trainings more p...
entry.content: All enhancement requests are reviewed by the Product Management team and, if successful, are developed and implemented in a future product release. I'm not aware of any processes to expedite their decisions... However, you may discuss it with your company's CSP.

entry.title: Switching to Spaces and Pages Experience Sharing – My Three Best Practices of Using Spaces and Pages
entry.content:
Introduction

From Release 2408, all our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition customers have moved from Groups to Spaces and Pages. After eight months of practices, some customers asked me about the Best Practice of using Spaces and Pages.  I think it is a good idea to give some of my advice on this topic.

 

My Three Best Practices

My best practices are three:

  1. Declogging My Home Page
  2. Personalize Pages to Your Needs
  3. Use As Many SAP Delivered Spaces and Pages as Possible

 

Best Practice 1 – Declogging My Home Page

My Home is the standard entry page with several sections.  The below picture shows one of the systems I have access to. It is colorful and marvelous to showcase all the bells and whistles of My Home Page. However, as a system administrator, I don’t use all of them on a daily basis. I need to tailor the My Home Page to my needs by only listing those objects I need to do my job.

A Very Busy My Home Entry Page

 

Besides Spaces Menu, all the below work is conducted in the My Home Settings dialog under User Actions Menu (the menu listed under your name).

  • Spaces Menu – Unpin not commonly used Spaces from the Shell Bar. Keep in mind that I can bring back these Spaces at any minute from the hamburger bar at the upper left.
  • To-Dos Section – if you are critical to a workflow process, you need to leave the To-Dos section there. Because it hits your eyes right away every morning when you log on to the system.
  • News Section – at this moment, the News section is prepared for you based on RASD information collected from your activated features and functions.  Yes, its content is tailor made for you based on your information.  Depending on your interest, you can reduce the content, or only display it right before and after a major upgrade.  In other words, it does not need to be on everyday.
  • Pages Section – although you are allowed to pin eight pages here, choose the most important one’s matter to you, not necessary all of eight.  You have another section Apps to pin the right apps to be handy.
  • Apps Section - Favorites – this is the place you need to pay attention to. Pin those mostly used apps in the Favorites tab. In addition, if you follow a workflow, you can put relevant apps in one Group. For example, when I create a set of new business users, I use four apps.  Now I bundle them together to be a User Creation Group.

Group a User Creation Workflow related Apps into One App Group

 

  • Apps-Most Used and Recently Used – these tabs contain all the apps you used.  The list is extracted from Recent Activities under User Actions Menu (under your initials at the upper right corner). There are two sections: Recent Activities and Frequently Used.  They correspond to Apps-Recently Used and Apps-Most Used, respectively. They are convenient tools to help you find the app you used.
  • Insight Tiles – add no more than five system overview tiles here. In my case, the IAM Info System and Application Jobs are import to me. For other apps, I can go there directly from the App Finder on a needed basis. They don't need to be pined on the My Home page all the time.
  • Insights Cards – Very similar as Insights Tiles, I only pin those needed reports here. Remember, when you pin many reports here, it takes resources to get the data when you open the My Home page.  The more reports you want to see them by default, the longer it takes to prepare and display them.

 

Best Practice 2 – Personalize Pages to Your Needs

The below figure is the Identity and Access Management Page of Administration Space. It is an SAP delivered page and your system administrator assigned it to you based on your business user roles.

SAP Delivered Identity and Access Management Page

 

Many users thought they should not modify these SAP delivery pages. Any changes should be made by the Administrator for all users.  Well, there is a misunderstanding here. You can use “Edit Current Page” under the User Actions Menu to modify the page.  The modification only affects you, not others with the same page.  This is a user specific modification on current tenant, not transferable to other tenants.

After editing, it becomes a very simplified page

The Identity and Access Management Page after Editing

 

If you change your mind, you can redo your modifications.

One note: if you want to preserve an app but not showing it, you can create a new hidden section and move the app tile to be there.

Working Session of the Edit Content Page

 

Best Practice 3 – Use As Many SAP Delivered Spaces and Pages As Possible

In the SAP Community, I had several discussions with community members on the pros and cons of using SAP delivered roles and their associated Spaces and Pages. One strong argument of against using SAP delivered business user role is from our SAP Activate:

“For the business roles in the Production System, it is strongly recommended to create custom business roles based on the identified workplaces.”

Let’s focus on Spaces and Pages here without too much discussion on the business user roles. Put in a simple way, Spaces and Pages are organizing apps according to a user’s job responsibilities.  SAP UX designers put in a lot of effort to organize these apps in a most reasonable way with the end users in their mind. It is a waste if not using them. Even if you develop your own business user roles, it still makes sense to use a similar SAP delivered Space and its Pages. In case your business user role doesn’t have a certain authorization because of lack of certain business catalogs (see my blog on User Management), the app just won’t show up on the page (marked as “Out of role context”). It doesn’t cause any damage to the Page.  The below figure from my blog Switching to Spaces and Pages Experience Sharing - Assigning Predefined S&P to Your Own Biz Roles just illustrate this concept.

Page with "Out of Role Context" App Tiles

 

Conclusions

In this short blog, I explained my three best practices for using Spaces and Pages with reasons and examples.  I believe this can make your daily work more efficient and enjoyable with SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.

 

References

  • SAP Help: My Home in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition
  • My Blog: Switching to Spaces and Pages Experience Sharing - Assigning Predefined S&P to Your Own Biz Roles
  • My Blog: User Management in a Nutshell for the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, public edition

entry.title: Re: #COE#BUMA Discard function in Import Collection

entry.title: Re: Offline Mass Update of Purchasing Info Records through Microsoft Excel
entry.content:

Do you know if SAP can handle it in standard way or adding field in the mass changes to PIR is custom? Appreciate your help! 
Thank you very much!

entry.title: Is Probo referral-code {9FSGLQ} working or not ?
entry.content: Yes this code {9FSGLQ} is working and used by everyone including elvish yadav in this year 2025.
